description: Newark Terminal C — United hub with the most dining options at EWR.

vendors.name: Starbucks
vendors.opinion: Multiple locations in C. Your safest bet for coffee.
vendors.shortDescription: Coffee and pastries; multiple locations in Terminal C.

vendors.name: Saison
vendors.opinion: Full-service brasserie. Good for a real meal before a long flight.

vendors.name: Qdoba
vendors.opinion: Build-your-own burritos and bowls. Fast and filling.
vendors.shortDescription: Build-your-own Mexican burritos and bowls in C1.

vendors.name: Panda Express
vendors.opinion: Familiar and fast. Orange chicken never disappoints.

vendors.name: Cheeburger Cheeburger
vendors.opinion: Burgers and shakes. Solid when you're in the middle of C.

vendors.name: Lucky Chopsticks
vendors.opinion: Noodles and rice dishes. Good alternative to Panda.
vendors.shortDescription: Chinese noodles and rice in C3; vegetarian options.

tips: Terminal C has the most options at EWR. Saison for a sit-down; Starbucks and Qdoba for speed. United hub so expect crowds.
